title: Creamy Nutty Saudic Peanut Wrap
description: This nutty and creamy dish features a high-protein-friendly combination of crispy rice paper wraps filled with almond butter, diced peaches, and a drizzle of honey.

ingredients.name: 1 cup cooked brown rice
ingredients.notes: Can be substituted with quinoa for a different texture.

ingredients.name: 1 peach, diced
ingredients.notes: Use ripe peaches to ensure softness when combined.

ingredients.name: 1 tablespoon honey
ingredients.notes: Optional for added sweetness and texture.

ingredients.name: Almond flour or semolina for garnish (optional)
ingredients.notes: To add a touch of crunch to the wrap.

instructions: Combine cooked brown rice and almond butter in a small bowl. Add diced peach, honey, and salt, mixing well.
Prepare rice paper sheets by soaking them in warm water for about 5-10 seconds until pliable but not soggy.
On a clean surface, place one rice paper sheet on your work area.
Spread about 2 tablespoons of the almond butter mixture over the center of the rice paper. Leave a small border around the edges.
Fold in half and then in thirds to create an easy-to-eat roll or wrap shape.
Optional: Sprinkle with crushed almonds, almond flour, or semolina for added texture before serving.
